items.title: AI Is Moving up the Software Lifecycle: from Code Review to PRD Governance
items.original_summary: Technology companies are extending AI beyond code generation into earlier stages of the software lifecycle, including PRD validation, design inputs, and code review. Initiatives from Uber, DoorDash, and Cloudflare highlight a shift toward AI-driven governance layers that evaluate engineering artifacts before implementation while preserving human oversight across the development pipeline. By Leela Kumili
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 报道 Uber、DoorDash、Cloudflare 等公司将 AI 从代码生成扩展到 PRD 校验、设计输入与代码评审等更早的软件生命周期阶段。属于行业实践综述，没有新 SDK、新 API 字段或新工具发布。已有 CI/CD 与代码评审流水线不受影响，但若接入相关平台需关注其开放接口。
items.backend_focus: 关注事项：评估 Uber/DoorDash/Cloudflare 是否对外提供 PRD 校验与代码评审的 SDK/API。若已使用 GitHub Copilot、Codex 等工具，无需立刻替换；关注这些平台是否会引入新的 webhook 或 API endpoint 用于工程制品治理。

items.title: Vercel Introduces Eve, an Open-Source Framework for Building AI Agents
items.original_summary: Vercel has released Eve, an open-source framework for building, deploying, and operating AI agents in production. The framework uses a filesystem-based project structure to organize agent instructions, tools, skills, subagents, communication channels, and scheduled tasks, enabling developers to define agent behavior while reducing the amount of supporting infrastructure they need to implement. By Daniel Dominguez
items.chinese_summary: Vercel 开源发布 Eve 框架，用于构建、部署和运维生产级 AI Agent，采用基于文件系统的项目结构组织指令、工具、技能、子 Agent、通信渠道和定时任务。属于新开源 SDK 框架发布，与 LangChain/AutoGen 等 Agent 框架形成竞争。已有 Agent 系统无需迁移，但若引入 Eve 需要按其文件结构组织工程目录。
items.backend_focus: 行动事项：若计划评估 Agent 框架，可安装 Vercel Eve（开源）做 PoC，注意其工具/技能/子 Agent 的文件系统约定与现有 LangChain/AutoGen 代码不兼容，需要新建项目结构。短期生产环境不建议立刻替换现有 Agent 栈。

items.title: Dapr 1.18 Introduces Verifiable Execution, Bringing Cryptographic Trust to AI Agents and Workflows
items.original_summary: Diagrid has announced the release of Dapr 1.18, introducing what it calls Verifiable Execution, a new set of capabilities designed to bring cryptographic trust, provenance, and tamper-evident execution records to distributed applications and AI agents. By Craig Risi
items.chinese_summary: Dapr 1.18 发布，引入 Verifiable Execution 能力，为分布式应用与 AI Agent 提供加密信任、来源追溯和防篡改执行记录。属于运行时框架重要版本升级，涉及 cryptographic provenance 记录。已有使用 Dapr 的 AI Agent 工作流应升级到 1.18 以获得新能力，但 API 向后兼容。
items.backend_focus: 行动事项：把 Dapr 升级到 1.18，确认 dapr CLI、daprd 与 sidecar 镜像版本一致；在 AI Agent 工作流中启用 Verifiable Execution 相关 component 配置，评估其对 Tool Use/function calling 调用链路的日志与审计影响。

items.title: Microsoft Expands Azure Kubernetes Service with Bare Metal, Fleet Management and AI Infrastructure
items.original_summary: At this year's Microsoft Build 2026, Microsoft unveiled a broad set of enhancements to Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) aimed at making Kubernetes a first-class platform for AI training, inference, and large-scale cloud-native applications. By Craig Risi
items.chinese_summary: Microsoft 在 Build 2026 扩展 AKS，新增 Bare Metal、Fleet Management 与 AI 基础设施能力，把 Kubernetes 打造成 AI 训练与推理的一等公民平台。属于基础设施层面更新，不直接改变模型 API，但对自建推理服务的工程团队意义重大。已有 AKS 集群可平滑升级，需关注 Bare Metal 与 Fleet 的计费模型。
items.backend_focus: 行动事项：评估 AKS 新 Bare Metal 与 Fleet Management 是否匹配自建 LLM 推理需求；升级 az CLI 与 AKS provider，关注新增节点池/GPU SKU 与 region 可用性。短期不影响调用 OpenAI/Anthropic 等托管 API 的代码。

items.title: Apple Launches Core AI for Apple-Silicon Optimized On-Device Generative AI
items.original_summary: At WWDC 26, Apple announced the Core AI framework, the official successor to Core ML. It is designed to allow developers to run large language models and generative AI entirely on-device, supporting both custom-converted PyTorch models and pre-optimized open-source models. By Sergio De Simone
items.chinese_summary: Apple 在 WWDC 26 发布 Core AI 框架，作为 Core ML 的官方继任者，支持在 Apple Silicon 上完全本地运行 LLM 与生成式 AI，可加载 PyTorch 转换的自定义模型与预优化开源模型。属于端侧推理 SDK 大版本更新，替代 Core ML。已有基于 Core ML 的代码需要规划迁移到 Core AI，新模型加载接口可能不同。
items.backend_focus: 行动事项：评估 iOS/macOS 应用中的 Core ML 集成，迁移到 Core AI 框架，关注模型加载 API、内存限制、max_tokens 与 context window 在端侧的配置差异。注意 Core ML 的 deprecation 时间线，制定迁移计划。

items.title: CircleCI Introduces Chunk Sidecars to Bring CI Validation Directly into AI Coding Workflows
items.original_summary: CircleCI has launched Chunk Sidecars, a new capability designed to bring CI-style validation directly into an AI coding agent's inner development loop. By Craig Risi
items.chinese_summary: CircleCI 发布 Chunk Sidecars 能力，把 CI 验证直接嵌入 AI 编码 Agent 的内部开发循环。属于 CI 平台功能扩展，与 AI Agent 工具链集成。已有 CI/CD 流水线无需替换，但若在 AI Agent 中调用 CircleCI 需关注新 sidecar 接口。
items.backend_focus: 行动事项：若使用 AI 编码 Agent（Codex/Claude Code 等）并希望内嵌 CI 验证，可接入 CircleCI Chunk Sidecars。评估 sidecar 与现有 CI job 的依赖关系，短期不影响常规 CircleCI pipeline 配置。

items.title: Article: Understanding ML Model Poisoning: How it Happens and How to Detect it
items.original_summary: In this article, the author explores data poisoning as a threat to machine learning systems, covering techniques such as label flipping, backdoors, clean-label poisoning, and gradient manipulation. The article reviews real-world incidents, discusses the challenges of detecting poisoned data, and presents practical defenses, tools, and operational practices for securing ML training pipelines. By Igor Maljkovic
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 发布关于 ML 模型投毒攻击的深度文章，涵盖 label flipping、backdoor、clean-label poisoning 与 gradient manipulation 等手法，并讨论检测与防御实践。属于安全知识科普，没有新工具、API 或 SDK 发布。对训练自有模型的团队具有参考价值，但非接口变更。
items.backend_focus: 关注事项：若团队自训模型或使用第三方微调模型，建议阅读文章并审查训练数据供应链。不涉及 API/SDK 版本、model id、context window 等接口变更，短期无直接代码改动。

items.title: AWS Previews FinOps Agent for Cost Analysis and Optimization
items.original_summary: Amazon has released AWS FinOps Agent in public preview, a managed service that automates several common FinOps workflows. The agent can investigate cost anomalies, correlate spend changes with AWS activity data, and integrate with tools such as Slack and Jira to route findings to resource owners. By Renato Losio
items.chinese_summary: AWS 在 re:Invent/Build 期间发布 FinOps Agent 公测版，是一项托管服务，可自动化成本异常调查、把支出变化与 AWS 活动数据关联，并通过 Slack/Jira 把发现路由给资源负责人。属于新托管 Agent 服务，与现有 Cost Explorer API 并行。短期不替代现有成本工具，需要时可启用新服务。
items.backend_focus: 行动事项：在 AWS 控制台开启 FinOps Agent 公测，配置 Slack/Jira webhook 通道与资源 owner 映射。评估是否替换或补充现有 AWS Cost Explorer API + 自建告警逻辑，注意公测阶段计费与区域可用性限制。

items.title: Article: Why Vector Search Alone Isn't Enough: Hybrid Retrieval for RAG
items.original_summary: In this article, author Aaditya Chauhan discusses the limitations of RAG pipelines based purely on vector search and how an internal omni-search application using Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF) that combines BM25 and vector results, can enhance the search solution. By Aaditya Chauhan
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 技术文章讨论纯向量检索在 RAG 中的局限，介绍结合 BM25 与向量检索的混合检索方案（使用 RRF 倒数排名融合）。属于最佳实践分享，没有新 SDK 或 API 发布。对已有纯向量 RAG 系统具有优化参考价值，但需自行实现混合检索逻辑。
items.backend_focus: 行动事项：评估现有 RAG 流水线的检索层，若仅依赖向量检索，考虑引入 BM25 + RRF 混合检索；可用 ElasticSearch / OpenSearch / pgvector + 全文索引组合实现。注意 context window 与 max_tokens 在混合检索下需要重新评估以容纳更多候选文档。
